evidence.claim: When the interaction occurs, the admin locks the account.
evidence.fact: When an account is locked by an admin, it cannot be used for any further transactions until it is unlocked again.
evidence.user_story_span: When the admin locks the account
evidence.fact_span: When an account is locked by an admin

evidence.claim: When the account is locked, the user cannot log in.
evidence.fact: After three incorrect PIN entries in a row, the account is automatically disabled to prevent unauthorized access.
evidence.user_story_span: the account is locked and the user cannot log in
